title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at MCX - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at MCX - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at MCX are looking for an experienced Risk Analyst based out of Navi Mumbai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About MCX:
MCX is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MCX!
